sentences.target: Je te conseille ce café près d'ici.
sentences.reading: /ʒə tə kɔ̃sɛj sə kafe pʁɛ disi/

translations.fr: Je te conseille ce café près d'ici.
translations.ipa: /ʒə tə kɔ̃sɛj sə kafe pʁɛ disi/
translations.es: Te recomiendo ese café que está cerca.
translations.de: Ich empfehle dir das Café ganz in der Nähe.
translations.it: Ti consiglio quel caffè qui vicino.
translations.zh-Hans: 我推荐附近那家咖啡馆。
translations.yue: 我推介附近嗰間咖啡店。
translations.pt: Eu recomendo aquele café aqui perto.
translations.he: אני ממליץ על בית הקפה הזה בסביבה.
translations.vi: Tôi gợi ý quán cà phê ở gần đây.
translations.nl: Ik raad dat café hier in de buurt aan.
translations.hi: मैं पास वाले उस कैफ़े की सिफारिश करता हूँ.
translations.el: Σου προτείνω εκείνη την καφετέρια εδώ κοντά.
translations.nb: Jeg anbefaler den kafeen like i nærheten.
translations.id: Saya merekomendasikan kafe itu di dekat sini.
translations.sv: Jag rekommenderar det där kaféet här i närheten.
translations.ro: Îți recomand cafeneaua aceea din apropiere.
translations.da: Jeg anbefaler caféen her i nærheden.
translations.ja: 近くのあのカフェをおすすめします。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
2nd person singular clitic pronoun functioning as indirect object (dative) of the verb.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive verb selecting a direct object ('ce café') and allowing a locative complement.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'café'.
Common masculine noun; direct object of 'conseille'.
First element of the fixed prepositional locution 'près de' meaning 'near'.
Compound surface with elided preposition 'de' (d') + adverb 'ici'; functions as the locative complement of 'près de'.

sentences.target: Nous conseillons un budget plus réaliste.

translations.fr: Nous conseillons un budget plus réaliste.
translations.en: We recommend a more realistic budget.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们建议制定一个更现实的预算。
translations.yue: 我哋建議一個更貼近現實嘅預算。
translations.he: אנחנו ממליצים על תקציב מציאותי יותר.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đề xuất một ngân sách thực tế hơn.
translations.nl: We bevelen een realistischer budget aan.
translations.hi: हम एक अधिक यथार्थवादी बजट की सिफारिश करते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi anbefaler et mer realistisk budsjett.
translations.id: Kami merekomendasikan anggaran yang lebih realistis.
translations.sv: Vi rekommenderar en mer realistisk budget.
translations.da: Vi anbefaler et mere realistisk budget.
translations.ja: より現実的な予算を提案します.

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive verb taking 'un budget' as direct object.
Indefinite article introducing the noun 'budget'.
Common masculine noun; direct object of 'conseillons'.
Degree adverb forming a comparative; modifies the adjective 'réaliste'.
Adjective modifying 'budget'; predicate-compatible, here used attributively.

sentences.target: Elle veut conseiller sa petite sœur demain.
sentences.reading: /ɛl vø kɔ̃sɛje sa pətit sœʁ dəmɛ̃/

translations.fr: Elle veut conseiller sa petite sœur demain.
translations.ipa: /ɛl vø kɔ̃sɛje sa pətit sœʁ dəmɛ̃/
translations.en: She wants to advise her little sister tomorrow.
translations.es: Ella quiere aconsejar a su hermanita mañana.
translations.de: Sie möchte morgen ihrer kleinen Schwester raten.
translations.it: Domani vuole consigliare la sua sorellina.
translations.ko: 그녀는 내일 여동생에게 조언해 주고 싶어 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 她想明天给她妹妹一些建议。
translations.yue: 佢想聽日畀佢細妹啲意見。
translations.ru: Она хочет завтра дать совет своей младшей сестре.
translations.pt: Ela quer aconselhar a irmãzinha dela amanhã.
translations.he: היא רוצה לייעץ לאחותה הקטנה מחר.
translations.tr: Yarın küçük kız kardeşine nasihat etmek istiyor.
translations.vi: Cô ấy muốn khuyên em gái mình vào ngày mai.
translations.ar: هي تريد أن تنصح أختها الصغيرة غدًا.
translations.nl: Ze wil haar kleine zus morgen advies geven.
translations.uk: Вона хоче завтра дати пораду своїй молодшій сестрі.
translations.hu: Holnap tanácsot akar adni a húgának.
translations.hi: वह कल अपनी छोटी बहन को सलाह देना चाहती है.
translations.pl: Ona chce jutro doradzić swojej młodszej siostrze.
translations.el: Θέλει να συμβουλέψει τη μικρή της αδελφή αύριο.
translations.nb: Hun vil gi lillesøsteren sin råd i morgen.
translations.id: Dia ingin menasihati adik perempuannya besok.
translations.sv: Hon vill ge sin lillasyster råd i morgon.
translations.ro: Ea vrea să își sfătuiască sora mai mică mâine.
translations.cs: Chce zítra poradit své mladší sestře.
translations.da: Hun vil gerne rådgive sin lillesøster i morgen.
translations.ja: 彼女は明日、妹にアドバイスしたいです.

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular feminine subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; control verb selecting an infinitival complement.
Infinitive functioning as the complement of 'veut'.
Possessive determiner (3rd person singular possessor); agrees in gender/number with the noun it modifies ('sœur').
Adjective, feminine singular form; pre-nominal modifier of 'sœur'.
Common feminine noun; direct object of the infinitive 'conseiller'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.

sentences.target: Vous conseillez de prendre le métro.

translations.fr: Vous conseillez de prendre le métro.
translations.de: Sie empfehlen, die U-Bahn zu nehmen.
translations.it: Voi consigliate di prendere la metropolitana.
translations.he: אתם ממליצים לקחת את הרכבת התחתית.
translations.vi: Các bạn khuyên nên đi tàu điện ngầm.
translations.nl: Jullie raden aan om de metro te nemen.
translations.hi: आप मेट्रो लेने की सलाह देते हैं.
translations.id: Kalian menyarankan naik kereta bawah tanah.
translations.ja: 地下鉄に乗ることを勧めます.

tokens.explanation: 2nd person plural (or formal singular) subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 2nd person plural; takes an infinitival complement introduced by 'de'.
Preposition introducing an infinitive clause ('de + infinitif') as the complement of 'conseillez'.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'conseillez de'.
Definite article introducing 'métro'.
Common masculine noun; direct object of 'prendre'.

Elle veut conseiller sa petite sœur demain.
Vous conseillez de prendre le métro.
